title: Apply Last-Modified time as mtime when saving URLs
body: When saving the contents of a URL to a local file, attempt to set mtime based on the response's Last-Modified header, if there is one.

comments.body: Telling Travis to run the tests under sudo without resetting $PATH, so the go compiler should be found at test-time.

Merging, since the last revision changed the invocation of sudo in the Travis config, and nothing else.
